title: koeleria cristata var. gracillima
intro: Koeleria cristata var. gracillima, also known as slender June grass, is a type of grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata var. gracillima include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
